title: Senior Software Engineer - Freshworks - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Freshworks - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
